idea-plugin.name: Offxy
idea-plugin.description:
Native Word (.docx) and Excel (.xlsx) editors for JetBrains IDEs — no webview, no Microsoft Office, no native binaries. The engines are the dependency-free docxy Rust cores (parse → render → edit → lossless save), compiled to WebAssembly and executed on the JVM by Chicory.

Word: documents render in a real IDE editor over a live, editable buffer — native typing speed on any document size, styles/tables/lists/images, guarded document structure, platform find and undo, a formatting toolbar, TOC navigation, and Markdown ↔ docx conversion.

Excel: a virtualized grid over a windowed viewport protocol — formulas with live recalculation, a formula bar, number formats, insert/delete rows and columns with reference rewriting, sheets, TSV clipboard, and one-transaction-one-undo.

AI-assistant ready: every open tab advertises on the agent control surface, so Claude Code, Junie, or any MCP client can read and edit live documents — each agent edit is one Ctrl+Z away.

Saving preserves everything the editors don't model, byte-for-byte — your document's structure survives the round-trip.
idea-plugin.change-notes: 0.1.0 — initial release: native docx editor (editable IDE buffer over the docxy engine), native xlsx grid editor (formulas, formatting, structural edits), agent control surface for AI assistants.

action.description: Convert the selected Markdown file to a Word document
Export the open Word document to a Markdown file
Replace all occurrences in the open Word document
